nasb.text: Now his master saw that the Lord was with him and how the Lord caused all that he did to prosper in his hand.

esv.text: His master saw that the Lord was with him and that the Lord  caused all that he did to succeed in his hands.

cnv.text: 他的主人見耶和華與他同在，又見耶和華使他手裡所作的盡都順利，

ccb.text: 他主人看出耶和华与他同在，使他凡事亨通，

csbs.text: 他主人见耶和华与他同在，又见耶和华使他手上所做的一切都顺利；
